name: @ph-clint/connect-agent
description: AI chat agent backed by Powerhouse documents, CLI REPL + Connect web UI

scripts.install: pnpm --prefix agent-app install && pnpm --prefix agent-cli install
scripts.build: pnpm --prefix agent-app build && pnpm --prefix agent-cli build
scripts.test: pnpm --prefix agent-app test && pnpm --prefix agent-cli test
